compiled_state.title: Tier B: port event-composers create/edit/link/unlink/revert to rebar._commands
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Port the larger leaf-write composers (ticket_create, ticket_edit, ticket_link, ticket_unlink, ticket_revert) to rebar._commands behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES. These are the heaviest Tier B bodies: create (alias generation, CREATE), edit (field validation, EDIT), link/unlink (hierarchy promotion + REDIRECT note, LINK/UNLINK), revert (REVERT). link's promotion cases (epic<->epic etc.) must be in the golden set. May be split into per-command child tickets when started.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each composer ported + switch-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] Each command's bash suite green against REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=bash AND =python
- [ ] link hierarchy-promotion + REDIRECT emission parity in the golden set
- [ ] Default remains bash

comments.body: create ported in 2f54256f (rebar._commands.composer): create_core (validation + alias + CREATE via seam) + create_cli (--output + flag parsing + envelopes). Dual-run green bash AND python on the full test-ticket-create suite (56) + library parity tests. Remaining composers split into children below.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: All composer children closed: create (2f54256f), edit (curb-haste-dent), link (per-snip-shore), unlink (shiny-pig-fig), revert (bossy-metal-mull). All dual-run green bash AND python. Closing.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
